title: Golden Days Base
description: Golden Days is a Minecraft resource pack meant to bring back old textures, lighting, names, and sounds from older versions of Minecraft, like Beta.
body:
→ Looking for [Golden Days Alpha](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/golden-days-alpha)?

Golden Days: A Minecraft Time Machine

Golden Days is a suite of texture packs for Minecraft that send your game back in time. They changes blocks, items, mobs, and even GUI elements to be inspired by the past.


## [Golden Days Base](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/golden-days) The main pack, meant to be usable in survival gameplay and does not remove any newer features in order to make it functional. Lighting, sounds, textures, and models! Everything you need for an authentic feeling experience. Use this pack on top of Programmer Art in order for it to work. ## [Golden Days Alpha](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/golden-days-alpha) The Alpha addon changes a few things, the main one being the iconic Alpha grass foliage color! Use this pack on top of Golden Days Base in order for an amazing Alpha-like experience in Modern Minecraft!
--- ## Client Mod Support: This pack has **extended capabilities** using some modded features: - Config Options (Chest Model, Cobblestone texture..., requires PolyTone) - Custom Particles (found in the Pale Garden..., requires PolyTone) - Modifiers (Block, Item, Biome, Dimension, Fluid..., requires PolyTone) - Custom Colors (Dyed Sheep, Text Colors, Fireworks..., requires PolyTone) - Custom Entity Models (Boats, Zombie Pigmen, Allays, Bats..., requires EMF) ### Directly Supported: - [PolyTone](https://modrinth.com/mod/polytone): Adds many resource pack capabilities. Config Options, Custom Colors, block properties, etc. - [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features): Gives Golden Days the ability to modify entity models. ### Pairs Well: - [Nostalgic Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/nostalgic-tweaks): A mod for Fabric/Forge that adds a whole ton of old Minecraft tweaks! It is really cool! - [Moderner Beta](https://modrinth.com/mod/moderner-beta): Adds accurate beta and alpha generation back into Minecraft! ### Not Supported: - OptiFine: No longer the intended experience as open source replacements are available. **Supported in Older Versions:** - [Enhanced Block Entities](https://modrinth.com/mod/ebe) (<1.21.4): Allows block entities to use JSON block models, gives full-block shaded chest models with Golden Days - [Colormatic](https://modrinth.com/mod/colormatic) (<1.20.1): Adds OptiFine style Custom Colors support. You are not allowed to redistribute my resource pack without official download links. You are not allowed to repackage my assets into your own resource pack without explicit permission. Please contact me on Discord in order to work out permissions for your own projects. All original Minecraft assets are owned by Mojang.
